title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week's updates focused on improving system reliability and preventing startup errors. OpsPal now automatically detects and fixes common configuration issues during startup, while enhanced Salesforce integration prevents data conflicts when Dynamic Forms are enabled and ensures proper record type permissions are automatically assigned.

entries.headline: Salesforce Dynamic Forms and Record Type fixes
details: OpsPal now detects when Salesforce Dynamic Forms are active and prevents field conflicts that could make fields invisible
New record types automatically receive proper System Administrator permissions, eliminating setup errors
Improved routing flexibility reduces session interruptions from keyword mismatches

entries.headline: Automatic dependency installation at startup
details: OpsPal now automatically detects and installs missing components when you start a session
Clear error messages show you exactly what to fix if automatic installation fails
